zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de St. Omer於大約1065年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，他的父親Baudouin de Guînes28歲，母親Mahaut de CRÉQUY39歲。他於大約1079年與Aganitrude de Bruges在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1128年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de St. Omer于大约1065年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫时，他的父亲Baudouin de Guînes28岁，母亲Mahaut de CRÉQUY39岁。他于大约1079年与Aganitrude de Bruges在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1128年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: St
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Omer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de St. Omer was born about 1065, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Baudouin de Guînes, was 28 and his mother, Mahaut de CRÉQUY, was 39. He married Aganitrude de Bruges about 1079, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1128, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de St. Omer est né environ 1065, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Baudouin de Guînes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de CRÉQUY, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Aganitrude de Bruges environ 1079, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1128, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de St. Omer um 1065 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin de Guînes 28 und seine Mutter Mahaut de CRÉQUY 39. Er hat um 1079 in Europa Aganitrude de Bruges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1128 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de St. Omer è nato il circa 1065 nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin de Guînes, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut de CRÉQUY, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Aganitrude de Bruges circa 1079, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1128, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de St. Omerが約1065年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Baudouin de Guînesは28歳，母Mahaut de CRÉQUYは39歳であった。約1079年にヨーロッパでAganitrude de Brugesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1128年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de St. Omer(이)가 대략 1065년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin de Guînes(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut de CRÉQUY(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1079년 우럽에서 Aganitrude de Bruges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1128년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de St. Omer nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Baudouin de Guînes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de CRÉQUY, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Aganitrude de Bruges aproximadamente 1079, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1128, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de St. Omer родился около 1065 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin de Guînes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de CRÉQUY, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Aganitrude de Bruges около 1079 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1128 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1065–Bef 1128: e tusa o le 1065–a'e le'I oo le 1128

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de St. Omer nació aproximadamente 1065, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Baudouin de Guînes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mahaut de CRÉQUY, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Aganitrude de Bruges aproximadamente 1079, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1128, en su pueblo.
